work.desc_title: Collection of texts related to Pilate

contents.label: 1. ff. 1r-12v: Acts of Pilate, Gospel of Nicodemus (beginning is missing)
2. ff. 12v-15v: Report of Pontius Pilate, Anaphora Pilati et Paradosis
3. ff. 15v-16v: Epistle of Herod
4. ff. 16v-17r: Epistle of Pilate
1. ff. 17r-21v: Story of Euphemia and the Goth
2. ff. 21v-27r: Forty Martyrs of Sebaste
3. ff. 27v-42r: Leontios of Neapolis, Life of Symeon Salos

work.desc_title: The capture of Jerusalem by the Persians and related stories

contents.label: 1. ff. 42r-55v: Strategios, The Capture of Jerusalem by the Persians in 614 AD
2. ff. 54r-55r: Story of a God-fearing man and his wife
3. ff. 55r-55v: Brief account on Caesar returning the holy Cross to Jerusalem
4. ff. 55v-56v: A Story of the Empress Helena
5. ff. 56v-57v: A Brief Account of the Conquest of Jerusalem
1. ff. 57v-64r: Acts of Andrews and Matthias in the City of the Cannibals
2. ff. 64r-64v: Life of Mary of Egypt

work.desc_title: Canons and questions of the holy Fathers and orthodox teachers

contents.label: 1. ff. 65v-73r: Timothy I, Canons
2. ff. 73v-81v: Išō ̔ bar Nūn, Ecclesiastical judgements and sentences
3. ff. 81v-92v: Basil and Gregory, Questions and answers
4. ff. 92v-94v: Extracts from the Acts of the Apostles, the Gospels and the Holy Scriptures with questions and answers
5. ff. 94v-106v: Demonstration from the prophet Elijah and John/questions
6. ff. 106v-108v: Isaac of Nineveh, Questions and answers
7. ff. 108v-128r: Basil and Gregory, Questions and answers
8. ff. 128r-130r: Riddles and enigmas from the Holy Scriptures
9. 130r-130v: Question from the Father to the Son

work.desc_title: Various texts on theological and exegetical subjects

contents.label: 1. ff. 130v-131r: Explanation of Biblical Greek names in Syriac
2. ff. 131r-133v: Description of the scepter of Moses
3. ff. 133v-142r: Demonstration on chronology and genealogy from Adam to the Messiah
